title: THREE.Vector3
description: A three-dimensional vector. Used pervasively in three.js for positions, normals, scales, and Euler offsets. Serializes either as a 3-element array [x, y, z] or as an object with x, y, z properties depending on context.

x.description: The x component of the vector. Default is 0.

y.description: The y component of the vector. Default is 0.

z.description: The z component of the vector. Default is 0.
